task.description: Add trading strategy display and system prompt info icon to agent cards on the dashboard. Each agent card should prominently show the trading strategy (e.g., 'Value Investor', 'Momentum Trader') and include an info icon (ℹ️) that displays the agent's system prompt in a tooltip or popover when hovered/clicked. The system prompt should be fetched from the backend API and composed from the agent's personality file.
task.context: Current implementation: AgentComparison.tsx renders agent cards showing name, portfolio value, P&L, and return %. TradingAgent entity has 'style' field (e.g., 'Value Investor') and 'description' field. AgentSummaryDto has a bug - constructor parameter is named 'strategy' but maps from agent.getDescription(). System prompts are composed from base template + personality files in agents/prompts/decision_maker/{agent}.personality.txt using the prompt_loader.py module. The personality files contain identity, decision criteria, and strategy information. Current Agent type in frontend only has id and name fields.
task.acceptance_criteria: 1. Agent cards display trading strategy prominently below agent name (using Mantine Badge or Text component). 2. Info icon (IconInfoCircle from @tabler/icons-react) appears next to strategy label. 3. Hovering or clicking info icon shows full system prompt in Mantine Tooltip or Popover. 4. Backend /api/agents endpoint returns systemPrompt field for each agent. 5. System prompts are loaded from composed decision_maker prompts (base + personality). 6. Fix AgentSummaryDto constructor bug where parameter is 'strategy' but should map from 'description'. 7. Add systemPrompt column to trading_agents table and populate with composed prompts.
